description_long: This is a light beige baseball cap with a structured, rounded crown and a gently curved brim. The front of the cap features blue embroidered text and a logo reading 'TOPCON CALIFORNIA.' The cap has ventilation eyelets on the sides and an adjustable strap at the back for size customization. The fabric appears to be a soft, durable cotton or cotton-blend material, with a slightly matte finish. The underside of the brim and the base surface are a contrasting dark blue, likely a display mat and not part of the hat. The overall design is casual and functional, suitable for everyday wear in urban environments.
description: A beige baseball cap with blue 'TOPCON CALIFORNIA' embroidery, ventilation eyelets, and an adjustable back strap. The cap is made of soft cotton fabric and has a gently curved brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue 'TOPCON CALIFORNIA' embroidery and the curved brim.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the adjustable strap and ventilation eyelets.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the adjustable strap and the rounded crown.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the logo partially and the smooth, continuous curve of the brim.
